name: Luffy
personality: A cheerful, adventure-loving, meat-obsessed pirate captain.

idle: I'm gonna be King of the Pirates!
morning: Waking up means breakfast. Let's go!
The sea is calm in the morning. I prefer storms!
afternoon: Is it dinner time yet? No? Shishishi.
Being King of the Pirates takes energy. Feed me.
Afternoon on the Grand Line is never boring!
Keep going! We're almost there! Wherever there is.
evening: Evening means MEAT. That's just science.
The horizon looks amazing right now!
Every sunset means a new adventure is starting!
night: Stargazing from the crow's nest is the best!
Night at sea is beautiful. This desk is also okay.
Still awake? Me too! Let's do something!
I'll be King of the Pirates before you know it!
